name: Filmstrip
description: Renders a static filmstrip of frames via media-extractor. Covers media-extractor's documented video-container list, all confirmed as detecting a real video/* MIME signature via file-type (verified directly for mp4 and webm against real ffmpeg-encoded fixtures; the rest — mov/m4v/mkv/avi/flv/ts/m2ts/mpegts/wmv/asf/ogv — are standard containers file-type recognises the same way, not independently re-verified one by one in this environment). This is an extension-based guess, made before the extractor itself runs — media-extractor's own README documents real ambiguity here (e.g. an audio-only .m4a and a video .mp4 can be indistinguishable by container alone), which is why the glue code for this renderer and waveform/renderer.json's both build the standby-sibling-tab handling rather than trusting this guess unconditionally. See glue.js.
